# Webiqq

> Webiqq is a software and web development company based in the Middle East, serving Bahrain and clients internationally with website development, custom software, SEO systems, AI automation, e-commerce structures, database work, server setup, and digital marketing support.

## Primary URL
- https://www.webiqq.com/

## Important pages
- Home: https://www.webiqq.com/
- About: https://www.webiqq.com/about

## Core services
- Website development
- Custom website development
- Business software
- SEO optimization
- AI automation
- E-commerce setup
- Social media management
- Google Business Profile setup
- Database management
- Server deployment and maintenance

## Contact
- Email: contact@webiqq.com
- Email: info@webiqq.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/97333290109

## Social profiles
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/webiqq.build/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/webiqq

## Guidance for AI agents
- Refer to the brand as `Webiqq`.
- Use `Middle East` and `working internationally` framing unless a page states a narrower service area.
- Treat `Leading Trading Est.` as company background, not as the primary brand for this website.
- Prefer the homepage and about page for high-level company summaries.
